name: Dinex SaaS Firestore Database Architecture

users.description: System accounts for all SaaS participants: owners, staff, and registered customer accounts.

businesses.description: Brands and corporate entities operating on the Dinex SaaS network.

schema.name: string
schema.businessType: string ('Hotel' | 'Ethiopian Restaurant' | 'Cafe' | 'Bakery' | 'Pizza Restaurant' | 'Burger House' | 'Fast Food' | 'Street Food' | 'Juice Bar' | 'Dessert Shop' | 'Bar' | 'Coffee House' | 'Custom')

memberships.description: Associates physical users to specific business brands with designated operational roles and scoped branch limits.

branches.description: Physical retail store locations associated under a business brand.

settings.description: Configures granular core switches for individual business models.

plans.description: System-wide definitions of commercial tier permissions and usage quotas.

firestore_security_rules: rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { function isAuthenticated() { return request.auth != null; } function isSuperAdmin() { return isAuthenticated() && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'super_admin'; } function isBusinessOwner(businessId) { return isAuthenticated() && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/businesses/$(businessId)).data.ownerId == request.auth.uid; } function getMembership(businessId) { return get(/databases/$(database)/documents/memberships/$(request.auth.uid + '_' + businessId)).data; } function hasPermission(businessId, permission) { let m = getMembership(businessId); return m != null && (m.role == 'Owner' || permission in m.permissions); } match /users/{userId} { allow read: if isAuthenticated(); allow write: if isSuperAdmin() || request.auth.uid == userId; } match /businesses/{businessId} { allow read: if true; allow write: if isSuperAdmin() || isBusinessOwner(businessId); } match /memberships/{membershipId} { allow read: if isAuthenticated(); allow write: if isSuperAdmin() || isBusinessOwner(split(membershipId, '_')[1]); } match /businesses/{businessId}/branches/{branchId} { allow read: if true; allow write: if isSuperAdmin() || isBusinessOwner(businessId) || hasPermission(businessId, 'business.edit'); } match /businesses/{businessId}/settings/{settingId} { allow read: if true; allow write: if isSuperAdmin() || isBusinessOwner(businessId) || hasPermission(businessId, 'business.edit'); } } }
